signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start your free Contentor platform in under 5 minutes.
signup.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to finish setting up your account.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

verify.verifyingSubtitle: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verify.provisioningSubtitle: This usually takes less than a minute.
verify.readySubtitle: Sign in on your new platform to start adding content.

errors.setupFailed: Setup failed. Please try again or contact support.

signup.authSubtitle: You're signed in as {name} — no email verification needed. Just name your new platform.

login.title: Platform Admin
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your platform.
login.checkInbox: We sent a link to {email}. Click it to sign in.

googleErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
googleErrors.tokenExchangeFailed: Could not connect to Google. Please try again.
googleErrors.userinfoFailed: Could not retrieve your Google profile. Please try again.
googleErrors.noEmail: No email associated with this Google account.

callback.errorDescription: The link is invalid or has expired. Please try signing in again.
